{"id":"project-LICHEN-inym.4","title":"Rust impl: Density-aware startup delay","description":"Implement density-aware startup delay in Rust node.

## Files to modify
- rust/src/ (locate announce scheduler equivalent)
- Add startup coordinator module if needed

## Changes
Mirror Python implementation:
1. Listen-first period tracking unique node IDs
2. Density-based delay calculation
3. Apply to announce, DIO, DIS first transmission

## Constants (from spec)
- LISTEN_PERIOD_MIN: 30 sec
- LISTEN_PERIOD_MAX: 60 sec
- DELAY_PER_NODE: 5 sec
- MAX_STARTUP_DELAY: 300 sec

- Unit test for delay calculation
